homepage.title: Framewise
homepage.metaDescription: Multi-tenant website builder with built-in AI assistant. Coming soon.

editor.blocksEmpty: This page has no content blocks yet.
editor.addBlockComingSoon: Adding blocks ships in step 40 (drag & drop).
editor.blockEditComingSoon: Block editing ships in step 41 (TipTap editor).

setup.goLiveDisabled: Status transitions ship in a later step.

setup.emptyOptional: No optional items for this plan.

setup.successBody: All required items are complete. Ask Framewise to publish the site — the publish button arrives in step 32.

publish.publishHint: All required items are complete. Click to take the site live.
publish.liveHint: The site is publicly visible. Click 'Take into maintenance' to pull it offline temporarily.

awaiting.notReadyMessage: Complete every required item first. Then Framewise will publish your site.

connections.title: Connections
connections.subtitle: Bring-your-own-account integrations for the active tenant.
connections.noTenant: No tenant selected for this session.

addPage.title: Add a connector
addPage.description: Pick a provider to bring your own account on board. We never own your tokens; you can revoke at any time.

connectFlow.successHint: Returning you to the connections list.

disconnect.confirmMessage: Disconnect {provider}? The provider will keep the account; we just stop talking to it.

errors.providerNotFound: We do not know this provider.
errors.stateValidation: Security check failed — please try connecting again.
errors.tokenExchange: Could not finish setup with the provider.
errors.unsupportedFlow: This connector does not support that flow.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong, please try again.

audit.title: Token access log
audit.subtitle: Every encrypt, decrypt, refresh and revoke is recorded here.
audit.empty: No access events yet for this tenant.

connections.byoaDisclaimer: This account stays in your name. We only have access to perform the actions you authorise. You can revoke access at any time.

moneybird.title: Moneybird
moneybird.description: Dutch accounting for freelancers and SMEs.

instructions.title: Connect with Moneybird
instructions.subtitle: Four steps. Token never leaves your browser until we encrypt it.
instructions.step1: Sign in to your Moneybird account at moneybird.com.
instructions.step3: Click "Create new access token", give it a name like "Framewise", and confirm.
instructions.step4: Copy the freshly generated token and paste it into the field below.
instructions.tip: If you manage multiple administrations, you can pin one by ID — otherwise we use the first one the token can see.
instructions.testFailedMessage: Double-check that the token was copied without surrounding spaces.

e-boekhouden.title: e-Boekhouden
e-boekhouden.description: Online accounting for freelancers and SMEs.

instructions.title: Connect with e-Boekhouden
instructions.subtitle: Five steps. The token is encrypted before it leaves your browser.
instructions.step1: Sign in to your e-Boekhouden account at e-boekhouden.nl.
instructions.step4: "Nieuwe API koppeling toevoegen" — pick Framewise as the application.
instructions.step5: Copy the generated User API Token and paste it into the field below.
instructions.tip: Sessions are cached for 55 minutes so we don't hit the rate limit on every request.
instructions.testFailedMessage: Double-check that the User API Token was copied in full.

e-boekhouden.sourceTokenWarning: This connector also needs an integrator-level Source API Token. Framewise must request it via support@e-boekhouden.nl (free, ~1-2 business days). Until that's provisioned, submissions will fail with CONFIGURATION_INCOMPLETE.

mollie.title: Mollie
mollie.description: Dutch payments — iDEAL, Bancontact, credit card, and more.

instructions.title: Connect with Mollie
instructions.subtitle: Pick a key type carefully — test keys never move real money, live keys do.
instructions.step1: Sign in to your Mollie Dashboard at mollie.com.
instructions.step3: Pick a Live key (real transactions, requires KvK + bank account) or a Test key (sandbox, perfect for demos).
instructions.step4: Copy the freshly-generated key and paste it into the field below.
instructions.tip: We auto-detect test vs. live from the key prefix and badge the connection accordingly so you don't accidentally take real card payments during a demo.
instructions.testFailedMessage: Mollie keys must start with test_ or live_ followed by 20+ alphanumeric chars.

mollie.testKeyWarning: Sandbox only. No real money moves; great for demos and CI.
mollie.liveKeyWarning: Production. Real transactions. Requires KvK + bank on the Mollie account.

stripe.title: Stripe
stripe.description: Global payments — cards, iDEAL, SEPA, Apple Pay, Google Pay.

instructions.title: Connect to Stripe
instructions.subtitle: OAuth handshake with your own Stripe Standard account. Five steps, ~30 seconds.
instructions.step1: Click the "Connect with Stripe" button below.
instructions.step2: Sign in to your Stripe account (or create one at stripe.com).
instructions.step3: Pick which account you'd like to connect to Framewise.
instructions.step4: Grant Framewise read access to payments and account info.
instructions.step5: You'll be redirected back to Framewise as soon as the handshake completes.
instructions.tip: We auto-detect whether you connected a test or live account and badge the connection accordingly so you can spot the difference at a glance.

stripe.byoaDisclaimer: Money lands on YOUR Stripe account. Framewise only holds a read-token and can never move payouts.
stripe.modeWarning: Stripe keeps separate test and live accounts. We always surface the mode on the connection card.
stripe.configWarning: This integration needs Framewise to register a Stripe Connect platform first. Please contact support.

paypal-business.title: PayPal Business
paypal-business.description: Global payment method — works directly from Curaçao, no Stripe Atlas detour required.

instructions.title: Connect to PayPal
instructions.subtitle: OAuth handshake with your own PayPal Business account. Five steps, ~30 seconds.
instructions.step1: Click the "Connect with PayPal" button below.
instructions.step2: Sign in to your PayPal Business account (Personal accounts won't work).
instructions.step3: Confirm which details Framewise may see (name, email, merchant info).
instructions.step5: You'll be redirected back to Framewise as soon as the handshake completes.
instructions.tip: We default to PayPal's sandbox. Set PAYPAL_ENVIRONMENT=live in production to process real payments.

paypal-business.byoaDisclaimer: Money stays on YOUR PayPal account. Framewise only holds a read-token to fetch account info.
paypal-business.businessAccountWarning: Only PayPal Business accounts are supported — Personal accounts cannot receive payments.
paypal-business.sandboxWarning: Sandbox mode does not process real payments. Perfect for testing and demos.
paypal-business.cwAdvantage: For Curaçao customers, PayPal works directly — no Stripe Atlas detour through an EU entity required.
paypal-business.configWarning: This integration needs Framewise to register a PayPal app first. Please contact support.

hubspot.title: HubSpot
hubspot.description: Global CRM — the free tier is plenty for lead-sync from the AI agent.

instructions.title: Connect to HubSpot
instructions.subtitle: OAuth handshake with your own HubSpot Hub. Five steps, ~30 seconds.
instructions.step1: Click the "Connect with HubSpot" button below.
instructions.step2: Sign in to your HubSpot account (or create a free one at hubspot.com).
instructions.step3: Pick which HubSpot Hub you'd like to connect to Framewise.
instructions.step4: Confirm Framewise may read and create contacts.
instructions.step5: You'll be redirected back to Framewise as soon as the handshake completes.
instructions.tip: We persist the Hub ID + UI domain on the connection card so you always know which account is linked.

hubspot.byoaDisclaimer: Contacts stay in YOUR HubSpot Hub. Framewise only holds a read+write token for lead-sync.
hubspot.freeTierNotice: HubSpot Free CRM is plenty for Framewise's lead-sync — no paid plan needed.
hubspot.autoSyncBody: Whenever the AI agent captures a lead on your site, the contact appears immediately in your HubSpot Hub.
hubspot.configWarning: This integration needs Framewise to register a HubSpot app first. Please contact support.

mailchimp.title: Mailchimp
mailchimp.description: Leading international email marketing — Forever Free tier, strong automation.

instructions.title: Connect to Mailchimp
instructions.subtitle: OAuth handshake with your own Mailchimp account. Five steps, ~30 seconds.
instructions.step1: Click the "Connect with Mailchimp" button below.
instructions.step2: Sign in to your Mailchimp account (or create a free one at mailchimp.com).
instructions.step3: Pick which Mailchimp account you'd like to connect to Framewise.
instructions.step4: Confirm Framewise may read your account info and audiences.
instructions.step5: You'll be redirected back to Framewise as soon as the handshake completes.
instructions.tip: Mailchimp hosts data in different data centers (us1, us2, eu1, …). Framewise auto-detects the right endpoint and persists it.

mailchimp.byoaDisclaimer: Contacts stay in YOUR Mailchimp account. Framewise only holds access for lead-sync and audience management.
mailchimp.foreverFreeNotice: Forever Free: 500 contacts, 1,000 emails/month. Permanently free, no time limit.
mailchimp.regionAwareNotice: Data center auto-detected via OAuth metadata (us1, eu1, etc.). Your API endpoint is persisted with the connection.
mailchimp.autoSyncNotice: AI-agent leads land in your Mailchimp audience automatically and can be used in campaigns straight away.
mailchimp.configWarning: This integration needs Framewise to register a Mailchimp app first. Please contact support.

brevo.title: Brevo
brevo.description: EU-hosted email marketing (formerly Sendinblue) — free tier 300 emails/day, GDPR-compliant.

instructions.title: Connect to Brevo
instructions.subtitle: API-key handshake with your own Brevo account. Four steps, ~30 seconds.
instructions.step1: Open your Brevo account (or sign up for free at brevo.com).
instructions.step2: Navigate to SMTP & API → API Keys.
instructions.step3: Click "Generate a new API key" and give it a name (e.g. "Framewise").
instructions.step4: Copy the key (starts with `xkeysib-`) and paste it into the field below.
instructions.tip: Brevo was called Sendinblue until 2023. Same API, same accounts — just a new name.
instructions.testFailedMessage: Double-check the API key starts with `xkeysib-` and was copied in full.

brevo.byoaDisclaimer: The API key lives on YOUR Brevo account. Framewise can send mail from your sender — contacts stay yours.
brevo.freeTierNotice: Brevo's free tier: 300 emails/day, unlimited contacts. Plenty for most small businesses.
brevo.sendinblueRebrand: Brevo was Sendinblue until 2023. Existing Sendinblue accounts work seamlessly — just log in at brevo.com.
brevo.gdprCompliant: Hosting in France and Germany. EU data protection, no data transfer to the US.

pipedrive.title: Pipedrive
pipedrive.description: Sales-focused CRM with a visual deal pipeline — no free tier, 14-day trial available.

instructions.title: Connect to Pipedrive
instructions.subtitle: OAuth handshake with your own Pipedrive company. Five steps, ~30 seconds.
instructions.step1: Click the "Connect with Pipedrive" button below.
instructions.step2: Sign in to your Pipedrive account (or start a 14-day trial at pipedrive.com).
instructions.step3: Pick which Pipedrive company you'd like to connect to Framewise.
instructions.step4: Confirm Framewise may read and create contacts (read + full).
instructions.step5: You'll be redirected back to Framewise as soon as the handshake completes.
instructions.tip: Pipedrive uses a per-company API domain (`<company>.pipedrive.com`). We persist it during the handshake so subsequent calls hit the right region.

pipedrive.byoaDisclaimer: Contacts stay in YOUR Pipedrive company. Framewise only holds a read+full token for lead-sync.
pipedrive.trialNotice: Pipedrive doesn't ship a permanent free tier — the 14-day trial is enough to evaluate the integration.
pipedrive.salesFocused: Pipedrive shines at deal-pipeline management. For marketing-CRM use HubSpot instead.
pipedrive.autoSyncBody: Whenever the AI agent captures a lead, it lands as a contact in your Pipedrive company so you can convert it to a deal in one click.
pipedrive.configWarning: This integration needs Framewise to register a Pipedrive app first. Please contact support.

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.description: We use cookies to improve your experience. Choose which ones you accept.

modal.title: Cookie preferences
modal.description: Choose which cookies you allow. You can change this later via 'Cookie settings' at the bottom of every page.

necessary.title: Necessary cookies
necessary.description: Required for the site to work (session, security). These cannot be turned off.

analytics.title: Analytics cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how visitors use the site so we can improve it.

marketing.title: Marketing cookies
marketing.description: For personalised ads and remarketing on other sites.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.placeholder_content: This is a placeholder privacy policy. The full text will be provided after onboarding.
privacy.placeholder_note: Customers receive a final privacy policy template at delivery (arrives in step 93).

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.placeholder_content: This is a placeholder for the terms and conditions. The full text will be provided after onboarding.
terms.placeholder_note: Customers receive a final terms-and-conditions template at delivery (arrives in step 93).

tenants.search: Search by name, slug or domain

actions.liveLabel: The site is live and reachable for visitors.
actions.cancelledLabel: This customer is cancelled — no actions available.
actions.confirmUnpublish: Are you sure you want to take the site offline? Visitors will see the maintenance page.

preview.maintenanceMode: The site is currently in maintenance mode.
preview.cancelled: Site preview not available — customer is cancelled.
